business.name: ABS Heating & Plumbing Supplies
business.tagline: Your Local Trade Counter in Birmingham

sample_reviews.author: Mohammed R.
sample_reviews.text: Great trade counter, always have the parts I need in stock. The staff know their stuff and are really helpful. My go-to merchant in Handsworth.

sample_reviews.author: Dave T.
sample_reviews.text: Competitive prices and friendly service. A decent local alternative to the big national merchants. Easy parking too which is a bonus.

sample_reviews.author: Karl B.
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant little merchant, been using them for years. They always sort me out with the right parts quickly so I can get on with the job. Highly recommended.

brand.usp: ABS Heating & Plumbing Supplies is Handsworth's trusted local trade counter, providing heating engineers and plumbers across Birmingham with quality parts and materials at competitive prices, without the queues of the big chains.
brand.hero_headline: Quality Heating & Plumbing Parts, Ready Today
brand.about_paragraph: We've been serving the trade from our Handsworth branch for years, supplying local plumbers and heating engineers with everything they need to get the job done. At ABS Heating & Plumbing Supplies, we stock a wide range of boiler parts, pipework, radiators, bathroom fittings and tools — all available over the counter so you're never left waiting. We're proud to be the reliable, friendly local merchant that Birmingham's tradespeople come back to time and again.
